2404280.name: Sync Adventure
2404280.description:
Sync Adventure is a simple indie platform game. In the game, you control Slime across the platforms, go to space, and defeat the boss.

It is one-button designed, you can pause, resume, restart, quit the game, move, jump, drive a spaceship, shoot cannons, and defeat a boss all by just pressing one button. With different pressing time, you can control Slime as you wish.

By counting the death and the time reaching certain levels. The difficulty will automatically adjust.

About the estimated gaming time, it is expected to be within one hour or maybe even shorter for the first try.

Key Features:
- One-button designed
- Adaptive difficulty system
- 3 difficult star-collecting challenges
- Inappropriate music and sound effects
- Simple graphics
